title: ctenitis submarginalis
intro: Ctenitis submarginalis, also known as the Submarginal Ctenitis or Thread fern, is a plant species in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenitis submarginalis include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, fever, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
